suggestions.title: Duration alert logic can miss >90s executions
suggestions.resolution: Changed duration metric alert aggregation from `Average` to `Maximum` so any execution over 90 seconds triggers the alert.

suggestions.title: Clarify/reuse existing email action group behavior
suggestions.rationale: Current implementation keeps a single shared action group in the alerts module and all alert rules reference it. Reusing an externally existing action group resource ID can be added as a follow-up enhancement without blocking INF-03 acceptance criteria.

suggestions.title: Add CD/portal verification evidence for deployment and visibility criteria
suggestions.rationale: CI/CD workflow execution and Azure Portal visibility validation require runtime environment access outside this repository-only implementation step.
